summary: Comprehensive testing of Aluguéis de Máquinas and Central de Notificações features completed successfully. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth login success
Backend: GET /api/admin/maquinas-disponiveis returns machines from management system
Backend: GET /api/admin/alugueis returns list of alugueis
Backend: GET /api/admin/alugueis?status=ativo filters by status
Backend: POST /api/admin/alugueis creates aluguel with automatic conta a receber
Backend: All period types work (hora, diaria, semanal, quinzenal, mensal, semestral, anual, outro)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/alugueis/{id} updates aluguel
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/alugueis/{id}/status finalizes aluguel and marks conta as quitada
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/alugueis/{id} deletes aluguel and associated conta a receber
Backend: GET /api/admin/notificacoes returns notifications with resumo and prazo_dias
Backend: GET /api/admin/notificacoes?prazo_dias=30 supports custom prazo
Backend: Notificacoes have urgency classification (alta, media, baixa)
Backend: GET /api/admin/notificacoes/contagem returns count for badge
Frontend: AdminLayout shows Notificações link with badge count
Frontend: AdminLayout shows Aluguéis link in sidebar
Frontend: AlugueisPage loads with summary cards (Total, Ativos, Valor Ativos)
Frontend: AlugueisPage has filter buttons (Todos, Ativos, Finalizados, Cancelados)
Frontend: AlugueisPage search functionality works
Frontend: Novo Aluguel modal opens with all required fields
Frontend: Machine select shows machines from management system (14 machines)
Frontend: Period type select has all options (hora, diaria, semanal, etc.)
Frontend: 'Gerar conta a receber' checkbox is present and checked by default
Frontend: Creating aluguel shows success toast and updates list
Frontend: Finalizar aluguel button works and marks conta as quitada
Frontend: NotificacoesPage loads with configurable prazo
Frontend: NotificacoesPage shows summary cards (Vencidas, A Pagar, A Receber, OS, Aluguéis)
Frontend: NotificacoesPage has type filters (Todos, A Pagar, A Receber, OS, Aluguéis)
Frontend: NotificacoesPage has urgency filters (Todas, Urgente, Atenção, Em breve)
Frontend: Notification items show correct urgency labels and values
seed_data_creation: Test aluguel created and cleaned up during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Aluguéis de Máquinas and Central de Notificações features fully implemented and tested. Aluguéis page at /administrativo/alugueis with CRUD operations, machine selection from management system, all period types (hora, diaria, semanal, quinzenal, mensal, semestral, anual, outro), automatic conta a receber generation, and finalizar functionality that marks conta as quitada. Notificações page at /administrativo/notificacoes with configurable prazo, type/urgency filters, and shows contas a pagar, contas a receber, ordens de serviço, and aluguéis with upcoming due dates. AdminLayout has notification bell with badge count in sidebar.

alugueis.machine_selection: Working - Shows machines from management system
alugueis.period_types: Working - hora, diaria, semanal, quinzenal, mensal, semestral, anual, outro
alugueis.conta_receber_generation: Working - Automatically creates conta a receber when checkbox is checked
alugueis.finalizar: Working - Marks aluguel as finalizado and conta a receber as quitada
alugueis.search: Working - Search by number, client, or machine

notificacoes.resumo: Working - Shows total, vencidas, alta, media, baixa counts
notificacoes.por_tipo: Working - Shows counts for conta_pagar, conta_receber, ordem_servico, aluguel
notificacoes.urgency_classification: Working - alta (vencida or <=3 days), media (<=3 days), baixa (>3 days)
notificacoes.type_filters: Working - Todos, A Pagar, A Receber, OS, Aluguéis
notificacoes.urgency_filters: Working - Todas, Urgente, Atenção, Em breve
notificacoes.contagem_badge: Working - Returns total and vencidas count for header badge

admin_layout.notification_bell: Working - Shows in sidebar with badge count
